wafv2.rulegroup.regexmatchstatement.CfnA: A rule statement used to search web request components for a match against a single regular expression.

wafv2.rulegroup.regexmatchstatement.Fiel.Description: The part of a web request that you want AWS WAF to inspect. For more information, see `FieldToMatch`.

wafv2.rulegroup.regexmatchstatement.Rege.Description: The string representing the regular expression.

wafv2.rulegroup.regexmatchstatement.Text.Description: Text transformations eliminate some of the unusual formatting that attackers use in web requests in an effort to bypass detection. If you specify one or more transformations in a rule statement, AWS WAF performs all transformations on the content of the request component identified by `FieldToMatch`, starting from the lowest priority setting, before inspecting the content for a match.
